title: GUI SimpleStylized
description: Enhanced user interface in dark mode with square edges.
body:
# GUI SimpleStylized
**Enhanced user interface in dark mode with square edges.**

[![IMG Badge - Wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/-WIKI-2c2c2c?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitbook&logoColor=white)](https://gabriel-djalayer.gitbook.io/gdteam-wiki/projects/ressource-packs/gui-simplestylized)
[![IMG Badge - Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/-SOURCE-2c2c2c?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/GabrielDja/GUI-SimpleStylized)
[![IMG Badge - Download on Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/ON-CURSEFORGE-_?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=2c2c2c&color=e58e0e&logoColor=e58e0e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gui-simplestylized)
[![IMG Badge - Download on Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/ON-MODRINTH-_?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=2c2c2c&color=17b95a&logoColor=17b95a)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-simplestylized)
[![IMG Badge - Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/-SUPPORT-6d30fd?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/gabrieldja)
[![IMG Badge - GD Team](https://img.shields.io/badge/MY_WEBSITE-245cf3?style=for-the-badge)](https://gabrieldjalayer.wixsite.com/gabrieldja-gaming-yt)

### ⭐ Features:
- Includes over 6+ add-ons dedicated to the pack -> [**(Link to my website)**](https://gabrieldjalayer.wixsite.com/gabrieldja-gaming-yt/gui-simplestylized#addons)
- Compatible with +150 mods!

[**See all supported mods!**](https://github.com/GabrielDja/GUI-SimpleStylized)  

### 📜 LICENSE
This pack was created by **GabrielDja**.  
📑 **[Read the terms of use](https://gabriel-djalayer.gitbook.io/gdteam-wiki/guides/licenses#gui-simplestylized)**
